info.title: Aspose.BarCode.Cloud v4.0 Specification
info.description: High quality barcodes generation and recognition API

get.summary: Generate a barcode using a GET request with parameters in the route and query string.

parameters.name: barcodeType
parameters.description: Type of barcode to generate.

parameters.name: dataType
parameters.description:
Type of data to encode.
Default value: StringData.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: String that represents the data to encode.

parameters.name: imageFormat
parameters.description:
Barcode output image format.
Default value: png.

parameters.name: textLocation
parameters.description:
Specify the displayed text location. Set to CodeLocation.None to hide CodeText.
Default value depends on BarcodeType: CodeLocation.Below for 1D barcodes and CodeLocation.None for 2D barcodes.

parameters.name: foregroundColor
parameters.description:
Specify the display color for bars and content.
Value: Color name from https://reference.aspose.com/drawing/net/system.drawing/color/ or ARGB value starting with #.
For example: AliceBlue or #FF000000.
Default value: Black.

parameters.name: backgroundColor
parameters.description:
Background color of the barcode image.
Value: Color name from https://reference.aspose.com/drawing/net/system.drawing/color/ or ARGB value starting with #.
For example: AliceBlue or #FF000000.
Default value: White.

parameters.name: units
parameters.description: Common units for all measurements. Default units: pixels.

parameters.name: resolution
parameters.description:
Resolution of the barcode image.
One value for both dimensions.
Default value: 96 dpi.
Decimal separator is a dot.

parameters.name: imageHeight
parameters.description:
Height of the barcode image in the specified units. Default units: pixels.
Decimal separator is a dot.

parameters.name: imageWidth
parameters.description:
Width of the barcode image in the specified units. Default units: pixels.
Decimal separator is a dot.

parameters.name: rotationAngle
parameters.description:
Barcode image rotation angle, measured in degrees. For example, RotationAngle = 0 or RotationAngle = 360 means no rotation.
If RotationAngle is not equal to 90, 180, 270, or 0, it may increase the difficulty for the scanner to read the image.
Default value: 0.

parameters.name: qrEncodeMode
parameters.description: QR barcode encode mode.

parameters.name: qrErrorLevel
parameters.description: QR barcode error correction level.

parameters.name: qrVersion
parameters.description: QR barcode version. Automatically selects the smallest version that fits the data.

parameters.name: qrECIEncoding
parameters.description: ECI encoding for QR barcode data.

parameters.name: qrAspectRatio
parameters.description: QR barcode aspect ratio. Values: 0 to 1.

parameters.name: microQRVersion
parameters.description: MicroQR barcode version. Used when BarcodeType is MicroQR.

parameters.name: rectMicroQrVersion
parameters.description: RectMicroQR barcode version. Used when BarcodeType is RectMicroQR.

parameters.name: code128EncodeMode
parameters.description: Code128 barcode encode mode. Controls which Code 128 subset (A, B, C, or mix) is used.

parameters.name: pdf417EncodeMode
parameters.description: PDF417 barcode encode mode.

parameters.name: pdf417ErrorLevel
parameters.description: PDF417 barcode error correction level.

parameters.name: pdf417Truncate
parameters.description: Whether to use truncated PDF417 format (removes right-side stop pattern).

parameters.name: pdf417Columns
parameters.description: Number of columns in the PDF417 barcode. Values between 1 and 30. 0 for auto.

parameters.name: pdf417Rows
parameters.description: Number of rows in the PDF417 barcode. Values between 3 and 90. 0 for automatic.

parameters.name: pdf417AspectRatio
parameters.description: PDF417 barcode aspect ratio (height/width of the barcode module). Values are defined by the standard: 2 to 5 for MicroPdf417; 3 to 5 for Pdf417 and MacroPdf417.

parameters.name: pdf417ECIEncoding
parameters.description: ECI encoding for PDF417 barcode data.

parameters.name: pdf417IsReaderInitialization
parameters.description: Whether the barcode is used for reader initialization (programming).

parameters.name: pdf417MacroCharacters
parameters.description: Macro character to prepend (structured append).

parameters.name: pdf417IsLinked
parameters.description: Whether to use linked mode (for MicroPdf417).

parameters.name: pdf417IsCode128Emulation
parameters.description: Whether to use Code128 emulation for MicroPdf417.

post.summary: Generate a barcode using a POST request with parameters in a multipart form.

post.summary: Generate a barcode using a POST request with parameters in the request body in JSON or XML format.

get.summary:
Recognize a barcode from a file on an Internet server using a GET request with a query string parameter.
For recognizing files from your hard drive, use `recognize-body` or `recognize-multipart` endpoints instead.

parameters.name: barcodeType
parameters.description: Type of barcode to recognize.

parameters.name: fileUrl
parameters.description: URL to the barcode image.

parameters.name: recognitionMode
parameters.description: Recognition mode.

parameters.name: recognitionImageKind
parameters.description: Image kind for recognition.

post.summary: Recognize a barcode from a file in the request body using a POST request with JSON or XML body parameters.
Recognize a barcode from a file in the request body using a POST request with multipart form parameters.

get.summary:
Scan a barcode from a file on an Internet server using a GET request with a query string parameter.
For scanning files from your hard drive, use `scan-body` or `scan-multipart` endpoints instead.

parameters.name: fileUrl
parameters.description: URL to the barcode image.

post.summary: Scan a barcode from a file in the request body using a POST request with a JSON or XML body parameter.
Scan a barcode from a file in the request body using a POST request with a multipart form parameter.

code.description: Gets or sets api error code.

BarcodeImageFormat.description: Specifies the file format of the image.

foregroundColor.description:
Specify the display color for bars and content.
Value: Color name from https://reference.aspose.com/drawing/net/system.drawing/color/ or ARGB value starting with #.
For example: AliceBlue or #FF000000.
Default value: Black.

backgroundColor.description:
Background color of the barcode image.
Value: Color name from https://reference.aspose.com/drawing/net/system.drawing/color/ or ARGB value starting with #.
For example: AliceBlue or #FF000000.
Default value: White.

resolution.description:
Resolution of the barcode image.
One value for both dimensions.
Default value: 96 dpi.
Decimal separator is a dot.

imageHeight.description:
Height of the barcode image in the specified units. Default units: pixels.
Decimal separator is a dot.

imageWidth.description:
Width of the barcode image in the specified units. Default units: pixels.
Decimal separator is a dot.

rotationAngle.description:
Barcode image rotation angle, measured in degrees. For example, RotationAngle = 0 or RotationAngle = 360 means no rotation.
If RotationAngle is not equal to 90, 180, 270, or 0, it may increase the difficulty for the scanner to read the image.
Default value: 0.

barcodes.description: List of barcodes that are present in the image.

BarcodeResponseList.description: Represents information about a barcode list.

data.description: String that represents the data to encode.

EncodeData.description: Data to encode in a barcode.

EncodeDataType.description: Types of data that can be encoded into a barcode.

Pdf417ErrorLevel.description: PDF417 barcode error correction level. Mirrors https://reference.aspose.com/barcode/net/aspose.barcode.generation/pdf417errorlevel/

pdf417Truncate.description: Whether to use truncated PDF417 format (removes right-side stop pattern).

pdf417Columns.description: Number of columns in the PDF417 barcode. Values between 1 and 30. 0 for auto.

pdf417Rows.description: Number of rows in the PDF417 barcode. Values between 3 and 90. 0 for automatic.

pdf417AspectRatio.description: PDF417 barcode aspect ratio (height/width of the barcode module). Values are defined by the standard: 2 to 5 for MicroPdf417; 3 to 5 for Pdf417 and MacroPdf417.

pdf417IsReaderInitialization.description: Whether the barcode is used for reader initialization (programming).

pdf417IsLinked.description: Whether to use linked mode (for MicroPdf417).

pdf417IsCode128Emulation.description: Whether to use Code128 emulation for MicroPdf417.

Pdf417Params.description: Optional PDF417 barcode generation parameters. Applies to Pdf417, MacroPdf417, MicroPdf417, and GS1MicroPdf417 barcode types.

QREncodeMode.description:
QR barcode encode mode. Subset of https://reference.aspose.com/barcode/net/aspose.barcode.generation/qrencodemode/
Obsolete members (Bytes, Utf8BOM, Utf16BEBOM, ECIEncoding, ExtendedCodetext) are omitted.

QRErrorLevel.description: QR barcode error correction level. Mirrors https://reference.aspose.com/barcode/net/aspose.barcode.generation/qrerrorlevel/

QRVersion.description:
QR barcode version. Subset of https://reference.aspose.com/barcode/net/aspose.barcode.generation/qrversion/
MicroQR versions (VersionM1–VersionM4) are omitted; use Aspose.BarCode.Cloud.DTO.Enums.MicroQRVersion instead.

qrAspectRatio.description: QR barcode aspect ratio. Values: 0 to 1.

QrParams.description: Optional QR barcode generation parameters. Applies to QR, GS1QR, MicroQR, and RectMicroQR barcode types.

barcodeTypes.description: Array of barcode decode types to find.

fileBase64.description: Barcode image bytes encoded as base-64.

RegionPoint.description: Wrapper around Drawing.Point for proper specification.

fileBase64.description: Barcode image bytes encoded as base-64.

JWT.description:
JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme.

Go to https://dashboard.aspose.cloud/#/applications and choose application.

Use client_id and client_secret from selected application to authorize and get AccessToken.

Add AccessToken to Authorization header in form 'Bearer [space] and then your token'.

Example: 'Authorization: Bearer 12345abcdef'.
